name: safegraph-ai
description: Claude Haiku 4.5 powered AI coding IDE for VS Code: inline ghost-text completion, agentic chat, inline edits, and project-wide refactoring.

commands.title: Safegraph AI: Set Bedrock API Key
Safegraph AI: Check Bedrock API Key Source
Safegraph AI: Move Chat To Right Sidebar

safegraph.autoRun.description: Auto-run commands in VS Code Terminal. 'safe' runs allowlisted commands automatically and asks for the rest.

safegraph.modelId.description: Bedrock model identifier or inference profile ARN. Defaults to a profile that resolves to Claude Haiku 4.5. For direct invocation use anthropic.claude-haiku-4-5-20251001-v1:0 (or a regional/global inference profile of it).

safegraph.repositoryRag.enabled.description: Include local repository RAG context for each chat request.

safegraph.repositoryRag.maxFiles.description: Maximum source files to index for local repository RAG.

safegraph.repositoryRag.maxChunks.description: Maximum retrieved repository chunks included in each prompt.

safegraph.repositoryRag.maxChars.description: Maximum characters of repository RAG context included in each prompt.

safegraph.vectorRag.enabled.description: Enable optional semantic vector retrieval for repository context. Disabled by default until a sidecar provider is configured.

safegraph.vectorRag.provider.description: Semantic vector retrieval provider. turbovec-sidecar is planned for compressed local vector RAG.

safegraph.vectorRag.embeddingProvider.description: Embedding source for future vector RAG indexing.

safegraph.vectorRag.dim.description: Embedding dimension for future vector RAG indexing.

safegraph.vectorRag.bitWidth.description: TurboQuant bit width for future turbovec compressed indexes.

safegraph.vectorRag.maxResults.description: Maximum semantic vector retrieval results before reranking and prompt compaction.

safegraph.agent.maxFixLoops.description: Maximum autonomous edit-test-fix loops after Safegraph applies a diff. Only safe allowlisted commands auto-run.

safegraph.mcp.codegraph.enabled.description: Start the optional external CodeGraph MCP server with npx for repository analysis. Disabled by default to avoid slow or failing network-backed startup.

safegraph.agent.enabled.description: Enable multi-agent orchestration system for complex tasks.

safegraph.agent.maxConcurrent.description: Maximum number of concurrent agents running.

safegraph.artifact.autoGenerate.description: Automatically generate artifacts for task verification.

safegraph.completion.triggerMode.description: When to trigger inline completion suggestions. 'manual' only suggests when you run Safegraph AI: Trigger Inline Completion.

safegraph.completion.modelId.description: Optional Bedrock model/inference-profile id for inline completion. Leave empty to reuse safegraph.modelId (Claude Haiku 4.5). Set a faster/cheaper model here to lower completion latency and cost.

safegraph.completion.maxTokens.description: Maximum tokens generated per inline completion request. Smaller values keep Claude Haiku 4.5 completions fast.

safegraph.completion.debounceMs.description: Delay before requesting an automatic inline completion, to avoid firing on every keystroke.

safegraph.completion.multiline.description: Allow inline completions to span multiple lines (complete a statement or block). Disable for single-line suggestions only.

safegraph.chat.maxTokens.description: Maximum output tokens per chat response. Higher values allow longer replies. Claude Sonnet supports up to 8192.

safegraph.chat.temperature.description: Chat response temperature. 0 = deterministic, 1 = creative. 0.2 is good for coding tasks.

safegraph.chat.systemPrompt.description: Custom system prompt appended to the built-in Safegraph AI prompt. Leave empty to use the default. Supports Vietnamese/English.

safegraph.multifile.dependencyAnalysis.description: Enable dependency analysis for multi-file editing.

scripts.build: npm run build:webview && npm run build:ext
